summary: E2E tested Photo Reaction GIF Creator (4-step wizard) and Comic Story Book Builder Template Library. Both features fully functional. Backend: 14/17 tests passed (3 transient 502 errors on re-test passed). Frontend: All wizard steps verified with Playwright.
features_tested: Photo Reaction GIF Creator - 4-step wizard (Upload → Reaction → Style → Create)
Photo Reaction GIF Creator - 9 reaction types (happy, laughing, love, cool, surprised, sad, celebrate, waving, wow)
Photo Reaction GIF Creator - 5 GIF styles (cartoon_motion, comic_bounce, sticker_style, neon_glow, minimal_clean)
Photo Reaction GIF Creator - Single mode pricing (8cr base + add-ons)
Photo Reaction GIF Creator - Pack mode pricing (25cr for 6 GIFs)
Photo Reaction GIF Creator - Add-ons (HD quality, transparent bg, caption, commercial license)
Photo Reaction GIF Creator - Copyright keyword blocking in captions
Comic Story Book Builder - 8 genres with templates
Comic Story Book Builder - Template Library toggle (Template Library / Write My Own)
Comic Story Book Builder - Template auto-fill of story idea and title
Comic Story Book Builder - Page count options (10/20/30 pages)
Comic Story Book Builder - 5 add-ons with pricing

minor.note: Endpoints work correctly on direct re-test

critical_code_review_comments: Photo Reaction GIF Creator at /app/reaction-gif: 4-step wizard working correctly
9 reaction types with emojis: happy(😀), laughing(😂), love(😍), cool(😎), surprised(😮), sad(😢), celebrate(👏), waving(👋), wow(🔥)
5 GIF styles: Cartoon Motion, Comic Bounce, Sticker Style, Neon Glow, Minimal Clean
Single mode pricing: 8cr base + HD(3) + Transparent(3) + Caption(2) + Commercial(10)
Pack mode pricing: 25cr base for 6 GIFs + HD(5) + Commercial(15)
Copyright keyword blocking working for marvel/disney/batman/pokemon/harry potter etc.
Comic Story Book Builder Template Library: Toggle between Template Library and Write My Own
8 genre-specific template sets: kids_adventure(4), superhero(3), fantasy(3), comedy(3), romance(2), scifi(3), mystery(3), horror_lite(3)
Template selection auto-fills story idea and suggested title with toast notification
Page options: 10pg=25cr (Short), 20pg=45cr (Standard, MOST POPULAR), 30pg=60cr (Full Story, BEST VALUE)
5 add-ons with correct pricing: personalized_cover(4), dedication_page(2), activity_pages(5), hd_print(5), commercial_license(15)

success_rate.backend: 100% (14 passed core tests, 3 transient 502 errors verified working on re-test)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (All wizard steps and UI elements verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Both Photo Reaction GIF Creator and Comic Story Book Builder Template Library are fully functional. Photo Reaction GIF at /app/reaction-gif has 4-step wizard with 9 reactions and 5 styles. Comic Storybook at /app/comic-storybook has 5-step wizard with Template Library showing genre-specific story templates that auto-fill on selection.

comic_storybook_step2_template_library.toast_notification: Template applied! Feel free to customize it.
